value.body:
Found during a static review of the shared inbox list component.

Problem:
`InboxList` keeps selected inbox item ids in internal state, but it does not prune or clear that selection when `entries` changes after filtering, pagination refresh, or mutation invalidation. The Mark read and Archive buttons stay enabled based on `selected.length`, so bulk actions can be applied to item ids that are no longer visible in the current inbox view.

Evidence:
- `packages/ui/src/organisms/inbox-list/inbox-list.tsx:128-130` stores `internalSelection` and computes `selectedSet` from it.
- `packages/ui/src/organisms/inbox-list/inbox-list.tsx:140-155` only updates selection through checkbox toggles.
- `packages/ui/src/organisms/inbox-list/inbox-list.tsx:178-215` changes repository/reason/status filters without clearing selection.
- `packages/ui/src/organisms/inbox-list/inbox-list.tsx:217-230` enables Mark read and Archive based on `selected.length` and sends the full selected id list.
- `packages/desktop/src/renderer/components/InboxPanel.tsx:87-104` forwards those selected ids directly to archive/mark-read mutations.

Suggested remediation:
- When `entries` changes, intersect internal selection with currently visible `entries.map(entry => entry.itemId)` or clear it entirely.
- Clear selection after successful archive/mark-read mutations and when repository/reason/status filters change.
- Consider disabling bulk actions unless at least one selected id is visible in the current list.

Acceptance criteria:
- Changing inbox filters cannot leave hidden selected items queued for bulk actions.
- After archive/mark-read success, affected selections are cleared.
- Tests cover selecting an item, changing filters so it disappears, and verifying bulk actions do not submit the hidden id.

frontmatter.title: Clear hidden inbox selections before bulk actions

value.title: Clear hidden inbox selections before bulk actions
